summary: Comprehensive testing of DynoPay Next.js application setup completed successfully. All core functionality verified including frontend loading, navigation, authentication pages, backend health, environment configuration, and supervisor services.
passed_tests: Homepage loads at pod URL with HTTP 200 status
Landing page renders with DynoPay branding and logo
All navigation items present (How It Works, Features, Use Cases, Documentation)
Sign In and Get Started buttons functional and visible
/auth/register page loads and renders correctly with form fields
Backend health check /api/health returns 200 status with correct response
Environment variables correctly configured in /app/.env with pod URL
NextAuth providers endpoint functioning with Google OAuth configured
UI design and layout appear professional with proper spacing and contrast
